title: Parametrized view in some case start not work with disabled analyzer
description:
### Company or project name
_No response_
### Describe what's wrong
Parametrized view start not work with disabled analyzer and view created on cluster
problem find in ch v25.8.2.29
previous all works in v25.5.x
previous created param views working, if it recreate its become broken with disabled analyzer
This problem because many prod queries can be exists with disabled analyzer (during some occured bugs in it, its often disabled)
### Does it reproduce on the most recent release?
Yes
### How to reproduce
```
drop database if exists my_db on cluster analytics;
create database my_db on cluster analytics;
CREATE TABLE my_db.my_table on cluster analytics ENGINE = ReplicatedMergeTree ORDER BY id AS SELECT number as id FROM numbers(3);
CREATE VIEW my_db.my_view1  on cluster analytics AS
WITH
{param_id:Int64}         as param_id
SELECT * FROM my_db.my_table
where id=param_id;
CREATE VIEW my_db.my_view2 on cluster analytics AS
with
cte as (
SELECT * FROM my_db.my_view1(param_id={param_id:Int64})
)
select * from cte;
```
worked query:
```
select * from my_db.my_view2(
param_id=1)
settings allow_experimental_analyzer = 1;
```
failed query:
```
select * from my_db.my_view2(
param_id=1)
settings allow_experimental_analyzer = 0; --failed
```
### Expected behavior
all worked as before
### Error message and/or stacktrace
```
2025.09.18 11:02:05.913792 [ 7100 ] {fa7b5dd2-afb4-4350-835f-ab7dd6a50b02} <Error> executeQuery: Code: 46. DB::Exception: Unknown table function my_db.my_view1:  or incorrect parameterized view. (UNKNOWN_FUNCTION) (version 25.8.2.29 (official build)) (from 10.8.50.22:52992) (in query: select * from my_db.my_view2( param_id=1) settings allow_experimental_analyzer = 0), Stack trace (when copying this message, always include the lines below):
0. DB::Exception::Exception(DB::Exception::MessageMasked&&, int, bool) @ 0x00000000133a211f
1. DB::Exception::Exception(String&&, int, String, bool) @ 0x000000000c84f4ce
2. DB::Exception::Exception(PreformattedMessage&&, int) @ 0x000000000c84ef80
3. DB::Exception::Exception<String const&>(int, FormatStringHelperImpl<std::type_identity<String const&>::type>, String const&) @ 0x000000000daff02b
4. DB::TableFunctionFactory::get(std::shared_ptr<DB::IAST> const&, std::shared_ptr<DB::Context const>) const @ 0x000000001618d468
5. DB::Context::executeTableFunction(std::shared_ptr<DB::IAST> const&, DB::ASTSelectQuery const*) @ 0x0000000017c76dfe
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_db.test_table (id BIGINT, name VARCHAR(255), created_at DATETIME) ENGINE=InnoDB;
CREATE VIEW test_db.test_view1 AS SELECT id, name FROM test_db.test_table WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL 1 DAY;
SELECT * FROM test_db.test_view1 WHERE id = CAST(NULL AS SIGNED);
key_bug_features: Parametrized view fails with disabled analyzer setting
